event: Madonna and Child with the Infant Saint John the Baptist
symbols: two infants — Christ and his forerunner
Mary holding both — the Church embracing the Old and New
description: A painting of the Virgin Mary with the Christ Child and the young John the Baptist, in the characteristic style of late 15th-century Venetian painting.
theological_description: The Christ Child and the infant Baptist together recall the Visitation (LUK.1.41-44) when the unborn John leaped at the presence of the unborn Christ. John's role as forerunner is established from before birth: 'He will go before him in the spirit and power of Elijah' (LUK.1.17).

scripture_refs.reason: John leaping in the womb at Christ's presence
John going before Christ in the spirit of Elijah

_meta.title: Madonna and Child with the Infant Saint John the Baptist
